bird.name: Guadalcanal white-eye
bird.summary: The Guadalcanal white-eye (Zosterops oblitus) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is found on Guadalcanal.

relations.subject: Guadalcanal white-eye
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is in subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
